title: MC Coins
description: This datapack introduces five unique variants of coins, each with its own distinct value and purpose, adding a in-game economy!"
body:
## Hi!

This datapack introduces five unique variants of coins, each with its own distinct value and purpose, adding a in-game economy!

# **DOWNLOAD THE TEXTUREPACK ALSO!!!**

![Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cb4c802099708c24250f6200259264ca2dde87e.png)

## Version: 1.21 - 1.21.1 - 1.21.2 - 1.21.3 - 1.21.4
